public_support_routes.value: Luxembourg has linguistic leave for eligible Luxembourgish courses and a separate company-training co-funding route for eligible private-sector training, but A6's own eligibility under either route is not yet proven.

public_integration_route.value: Biergerpakt is a voluntary public programme for adults who live or work in Luxembourg, with introductory and advanced modules covering language, civic participation, administrative procedures, and life in Luxembourg.

value: Legacy 47% workforce-share copy is wrong; the verified figure is 45.1%
The absolute uniqueness claim is contradicted by public and private alternatives
Product-specific eligibility under linguistic leave or CVT co-funding is unverified
Any A6-issued certificate or Sproochtest-readiness evaluation has no verified external acceptance value
Turnover-reduction and ROI claims are unverified

workforce_signal.value: The European Commission page says cross-border workers make up 45.1% of Luxembourg's workforce.
workforce_signal.omission_reason: This is useful context, but it remains a single-source numeric signal and not a default dashboard field for A6.

target_audience_summary.value: HR teams, mobility managers, and relocated employees entering Luxembourg's multilingual and cross-border context.
target_audience_summary.omission_reason: This is a synthesis of the surrounding public context rather than a directly stated product fact.

independent_operator_examples.name: Prolingua
independent_operator_examples.evidence: Private provider already overlaps with language-plus-integration needs.

independent_operator_examples.name: Biergerpakt
independent_operator_examples.evidence: Public integration route proves the problem is real, but not as a fragmented operator market.

independent_operator_examples.name: INLL
independent_operator_examples.evidence: Institutional route confirms category demand and public alternatives.

pricing_or_offer_proof: Current proof is route and provider existence, not a clean bundle-price market.
value.social_funnel_signal: Facebook group search shows large Luxembourg expat communities (`Expats World in Luxembourg`, `Luxembourg Expats (Official)`, meetup/event groups), which confirms a strong social top-of-funnel for relocation and integration problems. The OCR pass did not reveal a clear paid onboarding-bundle operator inside those groups.
value.takeaway: The integration problem is real, but visible supply is still mainly institutional or broad-provider based.
value.why_not_stronger: No validated set of small onboarding-bundle operators is yet visible.

independent_operator_summary.omission_reason: Derived independent-operator signal for prioritization and further market research. Keep it out of customer-facing copy until translated into product-safe language.

product_bundle_scope.omission_reason: The rerun verified routes and substitutes around A6, not the exact bundle boundary of A6 itself.

product_support_route_eligibility.omission_reason: Official scheme-level routes exist, but A6's own eligibility under linguistic leave or CVT co-funding is not publicly verified.

product_certificate_acceptance.omission_reason: Recognized public routes were found at INLL, not for any A6-issued certificate or assessment.

roi_claims.omission_reason: The turnover-reduction and ROI claims have no verified evidence in this rerun.
